overview: Embark on an unforgettable 16-day European adventure that takes you through some of the continent's most iconic cities and cultural hubs. Begin your journey in the historic heart of Rome, exploring its ancient wonders before heading to the romantic canals of Venice. Continue on to the scenic beauty of Zurich, then immerse yourself in the timeless elegance of Paris, including a stop in the charming city of Rouen. Cross the Channel to experience the royal charm of London, and make your way through Colchester to the vibrant streets of Amsterdam, the Dutch capital. Conclude your grand tour with a visit to dynamic Berlin, blending rich history with modern energy, before departing with memories to last a lifetime.​

Welcome to Rome! Upon your arrival, we’ll be there to transfer you to your hotel. Later, our guide will meet you and provide all the essential information. You can also find details on the information sign in the hotel reception area.


In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, an excellent introduction to Rome. Here, you’ll find a variety of restaurants offering Italian, Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

Florence

Step into the heart of Florence with Travelxploria’s Florence Duomo Tour, an awe-inspiring journey through one of Italy’s most iconic landmarks. Led by our experienced guide, explore the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, marvel at Brunelleschi’s magnificent dome, and admire the intricate Gates of Paradise at the Baptistery of St. John. Climb to the top for breathtaking panoramic views of Florence’s skyline. Learn about the history, architecture, and artistry that make this cathedral a true Renaissance masterpiece. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support, enjoy a seamless and unforgettable experience, complete with priority access and expert insights into Florence’s rich heritage!

Venice

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We’ll depart Venice and make our way to Austria. Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to explore the historic town center and enjoy lunch. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey through the beautiful Tyrolean landscapes as we cross into Switzerland, arriving in Zurich.

Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to

We’ll depart from Zurich and travel to the French region of Alsace, where we’ll visit its capital, Strasbourg—a charming city that beautifully blends French and German influences. You’ll have time to explore and get to know the city. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey to Paris, arriving in the evening.

Private Transfer
Cab Transfer from Zurich to Paris
From
Zurich
To
Paris

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

1
Days in
Rouen

Embark on a half-day city tour of Paris, where you’ll explore some of the most iconic landmarks that define this enchanting city. Start by marveling at the majestic Eiffel Tower, followed by a stroll along the Champs-Élysées to reach the Arc de Triomphe. Admire the stunning architecture of the Louvre Museum and the beautiful Notre-Dame Cathedral. After soaking in the essence of Paris, you’ll head towards Rouen, a picturesque town in Normandy known for its medieval charm. En route, enjoy the scenic views of the French countryside before arriving in Rouen, where you’ll explore its stunning Gothic Rouen Cathedral and stroll through the cobblestone streets of its historic center. This excursion offers a perfect blend of Parisian elegance and the rustic allure of Normandy.

London

Today, we’ll have time to take a stroll through the center of Rouen. After this, we’ll travel to northern France. Crossing the English Channel by ferry, we’ll reach Canterbury, the religious capital of England, known for its charming historic center. Our journey will continue to London, where you’ll have some free time in the Tower Bridge area, one of the city´s most iconic symbols, before we head to the hotel.

Private Transfer
Cab Transfer from Rouen to London
From
Rouen
To
London

Discover London on a panoramic tour with a local guide that showcases the city’s culture and history. You’ll see famous sites such as the Parliament, the River Thames, and Buckingham Palace, where you might witness the iconic Changing of the Guard (depending on the dates). In the evening, we’ll establish a meeting point in Piccadilly to take a stroll through Leicester Square, Chinatown, and Soho, areas renowned for their lively atmosphere, theaters, and entertainment options. You’ll have plenty of restaurants to choose from for dinner before we return to the hotel.

1
Days in
Colchester

Leading towards Amsterdam via Colchester unfolds as a captivating cross-country journey that begins in the historic English town of Colchester, Britain’s oldest recorded settlement, where ancient Roman walls, a majestic Norman castle, and charming medieval lanes offer a glimpse into centuries of layered history, before setting off across the scenic countryside of southeast England towards the ferry or Eurotunnel crossing, then traversing the tranquil waters or the Channel Tunnel en route to mainland Europe; upon arrival, the journey continues through the picturesque landscapes of Belgium or northern France and the Netherlands, where windmills, tulip fields, and quaint villages dot the route, ultimately guiding you into the vibrant heart of Amsterdam, a city renowned for its artistic heritage, iconic canals, and cosmopolitan charm—making the trip not only a transfer between destinations but an enriching travel experience filled with historical intrigue, scenic beauty, and cultural anticipation.

Embark on an unforgettable journey through the iconic landmarks of the Netherlands with Travelxploria, where every detail is taken care of by our experienced tour guide and on-the-ground support staff. Begin your adventure in Amsterdam with a comfortable, seamless pick-up, and be guided through the picturesque Zaanse Schans, where traditional windmills meet Dutch heritage. Next, visit the charming fishing villages of Volendam and Marken, where time seems to stand still, offering authentic glimpses of Dutch culture. Our professional Travelxploria representative ensures every step is smooth and memorable, providing personalized insights along the way. With the best on-ground support, enjoy worry-free moments and scenic views, and be assured of a prompt, hassle-free drop-off back in Amsterdam. Let Travelxploria turn your Dutch day trip into a truly magical experience.

We’ll depart from Amsterdam and head towards Germany. Our first stop is Hamelin, a picturesque German town with shops and streets reminiscent of the Pied Piper of Hamelin fairy tale by Brothers Grimm. We’ll then continue towards Berlin, passing through Marienborn, the former border that separated East and West Germany until 1990. We’ll arrive in Berlin in the evening.

HOLIDAY INN BERLIN CITY WEST


Immerse yourself in the local culture with a guided tour of Berlin, the incredible capital of Germany. We’ll visit the historic center, the Museum Island, the Reichstag, the Brandenburg Gate, and the city’s main shopping streets and magnificent parks. After the tour, we´ll stop at the Holocaust Memorial and the Wall Museum, offering insights into the city’s challenging history during the 20th century. You´ll have free time to explore the city on your own. In the evening, enjoy the vibrant Kantstrasse area, which has a wide selection of restaurants, offering Indian, Asian, Italian, and German cuisine.

Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the "Glacier Village," where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.

Immerse yourself in the rich history and culture of Berlin with Travelxploria, where every moment is made seamless by our experienced tour guide and dedicated on-the-ground support team. Your day kicks off with a guided tour of the historic center, where you’ll marvel at the Museum Island, Reichstag, Brandenburg Gate, and stroll through Berlin’s elegant shopping streets and magnificent parks. Our knowledgeable guide will bring the city's story to life, sharing fascinating insights at the Holocaust Memorial and the Wall Museum, providing a deeper understanding of Berlin’s complex history. With our Travelxploria representative on hand, you’ll feel fully supported throughout the day, ensuring a stress-free experience. After the tour, enjoy some free time to explore the city at your own pace. As evening falls, dive into the vibrant Kantstrasse area, where a variety of international cuisines awaits, making for the perfect end to a memorable day.

Inclusion / Exclusion

Inclusions

  • Assistance on arrival and departure.
  • Accommodation on Twin sharing basis.
  • All Airport - Hotel - Airport transfers on Private basis.
  • All Tours & activities on sharing basis / Pvt
  • Vehicle will not be on disposal.
  • Daily breakfast at hotel.
  • In and around Zurich
  • Paris city tour
  • Half day city tour of Paris
  • London city tour
  • Berlin city tour

Exclusion

  • Bank charges, payment gateway charges.
  • Expenses of personal nature such as Laundry, telephone calls, tips, Liquor, Mineral water, Airport Tax, Insurance, Meal outside hotel etc.
  • Camera Charges.
  • Additional car usage beyond Itinerary.
  • Any supplementary service not mentioned in itinerary as a suggested addition such as water sports or any similar activity.
  • Any other item not specified in "Cost Includes".
  • Additional or incremental expenses arising out of acts of god, political disturbance, strike etc.
  • Any change in government tax structure and amount becoming due thereto.
  • Currency conversion charges.
  • 5% TCS.
  • 5% GST.
  • Return Airfare

day_details.day_summary:
Welcome to Rome! Upon your arrival, we’ll be there to transfer you to your hotel. Later, our guide will meet you and provide all the essential information. You can also find details on the information sign in the hotel reception area.


In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, an excellent introduction to Rome. Here, you’ll find a variety of restaurants offering Italian, Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine.

Join Travelxploria’s expert guide for an unforgettable journey through the heart of Rome, where history, art, and culture come alive. Starting from a central meeting point, our best-in-class support staff ensures a smooth experience as you explore iconic landmarks like the Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, and Trevi Fountain. Stroll through Piazza Navona, soak in the grandeur of St. Peter’s Basilica, and uncover the city’s hidden gems. With Travelxploria’s top-notch service, skip the hassle and embrace the beauty of Rome’s timeless charm. Let us craft the perfect adventure, ensuring the best experience of your Roman holiday!

day_details.day_summary: Step into the heart of Florence with Travelxploria’s Florence Duomo Tour, an awe-inspiring journey through one of Italy’s most iconic landmarks. Led by our experienced guide, explore the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore, marvel at Brunelleschi’s magnificent dome, and admire the intricate Gates of Paradise at the Baptistery of St. John. Climb to the top for breathtaking panoramic views of Florence’s skyline. Learn about the history, architecture, and artistry that make this cathedral a true Renaissance masterpiece. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support, enjoy a seamless and unforgettable experience, complete with priority access and expert insights into Florence’s rich heritage!

day_details.day_summary: Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

day_details.day_summary: We’ll depart Venice and make our way to Austria. Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to explore the historic town center and enjoy lunch. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey through the beautiful Tyrolean landscapes as we cross into Switzerland, arriving in Zurich.

4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg"}]

day_details.day_summary: Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to

4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg"}]

rowData.a_name: Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train
rowData.a_details: Journey to the Swiss Alps with Travelxploria for an awe-inspiring adventure unlike any other! From the moment you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, you’ll be guided by the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria tour guide who ensures a seamless and enriching experience. Travel in comfort by luxury bus and scenic train, soaking in breathtaking mountain vistas along the way. Arrive in Grindelwald, the "Glacier Village," where snow-capped peaks and charming streets create a postcard-perfect setting. Then, continue to Interlaken, a stunning town nestled between two pristine lakes, offering spectacular views and a taste of authentic Swiss hospitality. Whether you’re seeking thrilling alpine adventures or peaceful moments in nature, this tour is designed for all travelers. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—you’re guaranteed an unforgettable journey, where every detail is perfectly crafted to give you the best Swiss Alps experience.
rowData.images: [{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train/1740743277281-mountain-6741996_640 (1).jpg"},{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train/1740743277395-istockphoto-945092130-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train/1740743277427-istockphoto-584784714-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Activity/Zurich/ Day Trip to Grindelwald & Interlaken by Bus & Train/1740743277437-istockphoto-1072027966-612x612.jpg"}]

day_details.day_summary: We’ll depart from Zurich and travel to the French region of Alsace, where we’ll visit its capital, Strasbourg—a charming city that beautifully blends French and German influences. You’ll have time to explore and get to know the city. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey to Paris, arriving in the evening.

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

4.h_name: MERCURE PARIS PORTE DE VERSAILLES EXPO
4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Paris/MERCURE PARIS PORTE DE VERSAILLES EXPO/1741153631408-2579-21.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Paris/MERCURE PARIS PORTE DE VERSAILLES EXPO/1741153631575-5175-16-2.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Paris/MERCURE PARIS PORTE DE VERSAILLES EXPO/1741153631622-Photo restaurant 1.jpg"}]

day_details.day_title: Half day city tour of Paris and towards Rouen
day_details.day_summary: Embark on a half-day city tour of Paris, where you’ll explore some of the most iconic landmarks that define this enchanting city. Start by marveling at the majestic Eiffel Tower, followed by a stroll along the Champs-Élysées to reach the Arc de Triomphe. Admire the stunning architecture of the Louvre Museum and the beautiful Notre-Dame Cathedral. After soaking in the essence of Paris, you’ll head towards Rouen, a picturesque town in Normandy known for its medieval charm. En route, enjoy the scenic views of the French countryside before arriving in Rouen, where you’ll explore its stunning Gothic Rouen Cathedral and stroll through the cobblestone streets of its historic center. This excursion offers a perfect blend of Parisian elegance and the rustic allure of Normandy.

4.h_name: B&B HOTEL Rouen Centre Rive Gauche
4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Rouen/B&B HOTEL Rouen Centre Rive Gauche/1741154076425-2024-03-26 (2).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Rouen/B&B HOTEL Rouen Centre Rive Gauche/1741154076427-2024-03-26 (1).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Rouen/B&B HOTEL Rouen Centre Rive Gauche/1741154076494-2024-03-26.jpg"}]

day_details.day_summary: Today, we’ll have time to take a stroll through the center of Rouen. After this, we’ll travel to northern France. Crossing the English Channel by ferry, we’ll reach Canterbury, the religious capital of England, known for its charming historic center. Our journey will continue to London, where you’ll have some free time in the Tower Bridge area, one of the city´s most iconic symbols, before we head to the hotel.

Discover London on a panoramic tour with a local guide that showcases the city’s culture and history. You’ll see famous sites such as the Parliament, the River Thames, and Buckingham Palace, where you might witness the iconic Changing of the Guard (depending on the dates). In the evening, we’ll establish a meeting point in Piccadilly to take a stroll through Leicester Square, Chinatown, and Soho, areas renowned for their lively atmosphere, theaters, and entertainment options. You’ll have plenty of restaurants to choose from for dinner before we return to the hotel.

Leading towards Amsterdam via Colchester unfolds as a captivating cross-country journey that begins in the historic English town of Colchester, Britain’s oldest recorded settlement, where ancient Roman walls, a majestic Norman castle, and charming medieval lanes offer a glimpse into centuries of layered history, before setting off across the scenic countryside of southeast England towards the ferry or Eurotunnel crossing, then traversing the tranquil waters or the Channel Tunnel en route to mainland Europe; upon arrival, the journey continues through the picturesque landscapes of Belgium or northern France and the Netherlands, where windmills, tulip fields, and quaint villages dot the route, ultimately guiding you into the vibrant heart of Amsterdam, a city renowned for its artistic heritage, iconic canals, and cosmopolitan charm—making the trip not only a transfer between destinations but an enriching travel experience filled with historical intrigue, scenic beauty, and cultural anticipation.

4.h_name: Holiday Inn Colchester, an IHG Hotel

day_details.day_summary: Embark on an unforgettable journey through the iconic landmarks of the Netherlands with Travelxploria, where every detail is taken care of by our experienced tour guide and on-the-ground support staff. Begin your adventure in Amsterdam with a comfortable, seamless pick-up, and be guided through the picturesque Zaanse Schans, where traditional windmills meet Dutch heritage. Next, visit the charming fishing villages of Volendam and Marken, where time seems to stand still, offering authentic glimpses of Dutch culture. Our professional Travelxploria representative ensures every step is smooth and memorable, providing personalized insights along the way. With the best on-ground support, enjoy worry-free moments and scenic views, and be assured of a prompt, hassle-free drop-off back in Amsterdam. Let Travelxploria turn your Dutch day trip into a truly magical experience.

day_details.day_summary: We’ll depart from Amsterdam and head towards Germany. Our first stop is Hamelin, a picturesque German town with shops and streets reminiscent of the Pied Piper of Hamelin fairy tale by Brothers Grimm. We’ll then continue towards Berlin, passing through Marienborn, the former border that separated East and West Germany until 1990. We’ll arrive in Berlin in the evening.

4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Berlin/HOLIDAY INN BERLIN CITY WEST/1741086930248-2021-11-06.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Berlin/HOLIDAY INN BERLIN CITY WEST/1741086930327-unnamed (6).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Berlin/HOLIDAY INN BERLIN CITY WEST/1741086930366-unnamed (5).jpg"}]

day_details.day_summary: Immerse yourself in the local culture with a guided tour of Berlin, the incredible capital of Germany. We’ll visit the historic center, the Museum Island, the Reichstag, the Brandenburg Gate, and the city’s main shopping streets and magnificent parks. After the tour, we´ll stop at the Holocaust Memorial and the Wall Museum, offering insights into the city’s challenging history during the 20th century. You´ll have free time to explore the city on your own. In the evening, enjoy the vibrant Kantstrasse area, which has a wide selection of restaurants, offering Indian, Asian, Italian, and German cuisine.

4.images: [{"path":"/Hotels/Berlin/HOLIDAY INN BERLIN CITY WEST/1741086930248-2021-11-06.jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Berlin/HOLIDAY INN BERLIN CITY WEST/1741086930327-unnamed (6).jpg"},{"path":"/Hotels/Berlin/HOLIDAY INN BERLIN CITY WEST/1741086930366-unnamed (5).jpg"}]

rowData.a_details: Immerse yourself in the rich history and culture of Berlin with Travelxploria, where every moment is made seamless by our experienced tour guide and dedicated on-the-ground support team. Your day kicks off with a guided tour of the historic center, where you’ll marvel at the Museum Island, Reichstag, Brandenburg Gate, and stroll through Berlin’s elegant shopping streets and magnificent parks. Our knowledgeable guide will bring the city's story to life, sharing fascinating insights at the Holocaust Memorial and the Wall Museum, providing a deeper understanding of Berlin’s complex history. With our Travelxploria representative on hand, you’ll feel fully supported throughout the day, ensuring a stress-free experience. After the tour, enjoy some free time to explore the city at your own pace. As evening falls, dive into the vibrant Kantstrasse area, where a variety of international cuisines awaits, making for the perfect end to a memorable day.

day_details.day_summary: After breakfast, our journey will come to an end, leaving you with wonderful lasting memories.
